name: consultadd-rfp
description: Multi-expert RFP authoring workflow for Consultadd. Parses RFPs, injects firm boilerplate, runs eligibility checks, dispatches specialist drafters (tech, legal, ops, sales-marketing, public-policy), reviews, cross-verifies, and produces submission-ready proposals — with human-in-the-loop gates at eligibility, pricing, capability claims, and attestations.
